session.user:
Run these commands and report results:
1. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/shared.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py` 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/shared.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py` 3. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py -v`
Report all results including any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run these commands for you and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/shared.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py
Check ruff linting for shared.py files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/shared.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py
Check ruff formatting for shared.py files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest tests for shared.py module

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 11 items
tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py ........... [100%]
============================== 11 passed in 0.73s ==============================
session.assistant:
All three commands passed successfully:
**1. Ruff Linting Check:** - `ruff check` passed: All checks passed!
**2. Ruff Format Check:** - `ruff format --check` passed: 2 files already formatted
**3. Pytest Tests:** - `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py -v` passed: 11 passed in 0.73s
The files at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/shared.py` and `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py` are clean, properly formatted, and all unit tests pass.
